title: 日経賞の後に・ここがいい

text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin wins the Nikkei Sho and makes an
amazing comeback.

She realizes that she doesn't race because she has
nothing else, but rather because she loves it and
wants to win.

Her resolve thus renewed, Narita Taishin and I set
our sights on the spring Tenno Sho.
